name: Youngtek Electronics Corporation
summary: Youngtek Electronics Corporation provides semiconductor back-end foundry services in Taiwan. The company engages in wafer testing, wafer grinding and cutting and die picking, IC product testing, special substrate cutting, test program development, platform conversion, engineering support, and valet shipping; and AOI automatic optical inspection of LED dies and VCSEL components, die picking inspection, visual inspection, and other post-process OEM activities. It also offers IC sorting and bonding; WLCSP die sorting packaging; label flip-chip binding; and die and LED bonding machines. The company was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Hsinchu, Taiwan.
